title: Emit start activity and set started_at when a tick moves to in_progress
description:
Context: Claude orchestration claims ticks via 'tk update <id> --status in_progress' (skills/ticks/references/claude-runner.md:27). Today cmd/tk/cmd/update.go:166 assigns t.Status directly: Tick.Start() (internal/tick/tick.go:256, sets StartedAt=now) is never called, and detectChange() in internal/tick/store.go:124-208 has no case for the open->in_progress transition, so NO activity entry is written at all. Consequences: the board activity feed never shows work starting, and stale recovery (claude-runner.md:356) uses last_activity = max activity timestamp per tick (internal/tick/store.go:346 LastActivityForTicks), so a tick claimed seconds ago still shows its pre-claim timestamp and can be falsely reset to open by a resuming orchestrator.

Required behavior:
1. cmd/tk/cmd/update.go: when --status changes status, route transitions through the model helpers instead of raw assignment: ->in_progress calls t.Start() (sets StartedAt); in_progress->open calls t.Release() (clears StartedAt, internal/tick/tick.go:267). Closing already works via existing logic.
2. internal/tick/store.go detectChange(): add status-transition cases: any->in_progress returns ActivityStart (constant exists at store.go:262, currently only documented for the pool runner); in_progress->open returns ActivityUpdate with data {"status":{"from":"in_progress","to":"open"}}. Keep existing close/reopen handling untouched.

Test cases (add to internal/tick/store_test.go and the update command tests):
- Save open->in_progress: activity.jsonl gains entry with action="start"; tick JSON has started_at set (non-nil, ~now)
- Save in_progress->open: started_at cleared (nil); activity entry action="update" with status from/to in data
- Save open->closed: still emits action="close" (regression)
- tk update <id> --status in_progress then 'tk list --status in_progress --all --json': last_activity >= claim time

Run: go test ./internal/tick/... ./cmd/tk/...

Files likely touched: cmd/tk/cmd/update.go, internal/tick/store.go, internal/tick/store_test.go, cmd/tk/cmd/update_test.go (or equivalent command test file).
acceptance_criteria: open->in_progress emits a 'start' activity entry and sets started_at; in_progress->open clears started_at and emits a visible update entry; go test ./... fully green
